reason: Defines durable variant generation, proposal, selection, and fallback pipeline contracts.
Defines plugin interface and registry boundaries that the pipeline must preserve.
Keeps extension-specific semantics plugin-local while composing generic passes.
Defines target capability anchors and capability-require verification semantics.
Defines the compute-free tcrv.exec boundary for kernel, capability, variant, dispatch, and fallback metadata.
Defines RVV plugin-local metadata and proposal behavior that must remain outside generic pipeline branches.
Defines scalar fallback proposal behavior that the composed pipeline must preserve.
Defines lowering-boundary and emission/readiness metadata boundaries for the deepest included pipeline stages.
Defines lit/FileCheck expectations for public tcrv-opt pipeline coverage.
